allowlist.description: Example: CI helper script uses a fake token for local testing
Example: Known developer test key (NOT a real key) — replace or remove in real projects

notes: This is a minimal example baseline for gitleaks. Generate a baseline locally with: gitleaks detect --source . --report-format json --report-path gitleaks-report.json --baseline-path .gitleaks.baseline.json. Do NOT commit real secrets to the baseline.
